content.text:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
LinkPi.py  –  OpenAI-compatible HTTP bridge for pi-mono
with per-provider sessions and cross-provider memory consolidation
=================================================================

Architecture
------------
  OpenCode (VS Code extension)
    │  POST /v1/chat/completions  (OpenAI streaming API)
    │  model: "link-pi/<provider>"  ← provider encoded in model name
    ▼
  LinkPi.py  (FastAPI HTTP server)
    │
    ├── ProviderRegistry
    │     one PiProcess per provider, each with its own session directory
    │     detects provider switch → compact outgoing session → update SharedMemory
    │
    ├── SharedMemory  (~/.linkpi/memory.md)
    │     cross-provider context injected at the start of every new session
    │     built from compact summaries of all prior provider sessions
    │
    └── /v1/consolidate
          spawns a fresh pi session, feeds it all provider summaries,
          asks it to produce one unified memory document
    │
    ▼  JSONL over stdin/stdout  (pi RPC protocol)
  pi --mode rpc  (one subprocess per provider)
    │  --session-dir ~/.linkpi/sessions/<provider>/
    ▼
  LLM provider  (Anthropic / OpenAI / Google / …)

Model naming in opencode.json
------------------------------
  OpenCode only accepts baseURL/apiKey inside *built-in* provider names.
  Use the built-in "openai" provider pointing at LinkPi, then select
  a model from the pi-* namespace:

    "model": "openai/pi-anthropic"   →  pi --provider anthropic
    "model": "openai/pi-openai"      →  pi --provider openai
    "model": "openai/pi-google"      →  pi --provider google
    "model": "openai/pi-agent"       →  pi (no provider override)

  Switch model in OpenCode's model selector (Ctrl+M) to switch providers.
  LinkPi will automatically compact the outgoing session and carry
  the memory forward to the new provider.

Memory flow
-----------
  Provider A active  →  user switches to Provider B in OpenCode
    1. LinkPi requests compact on Provider A's pi session
    2. Pi returns a handoff summary (plain text)
    3. Summary appended to ~/.linkpi/memory.md
    4. Provider B's pi session starts; shared memory is prepended
       to the first user message as a [Context] block
    5. Provider B continues work with full awareness of what A did

  POST /v1/consolidate
    Spawns a temporary pi session, feeds it ALL provider summaries,
    and asks it to synthesise a single unified memory document that
    replaces memory.md.

Endpoints
---------
  GET  /v1/models       – list available link-pi/<provider> models
  POST /v1/chat/completions – chat with streaming (OpenAI-compatible)
  POST /v1/consolidate  – synthesise all summaries into unified memory
  GET  /v1/memory       – inspect current shared memory

Usage
-----
  pip install fastapi uvicorn
  python LinkPi.py
  python LinkPi.py --model anthropic/claude-sonnet-4 --thinking medium
  python LinkPi.py --pi-cmd /path/to/pi-dev.sh --port 9000

RPC note
--------
  pi RPC command responses are routed via asyncio.Future (keyed by id)
  rather than through the event queue.  This allows send_command() to
  await a response synchronously while the event queue continues to
  receive streaming events from concurrent operations.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import asyncio
import json
import logging
import os
import shutil
import sys
import time
import uuid
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path
from typing import AsyncIterator, Optional

import uvicorn
from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
from fastapi import FastAPI, Request
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse, StreamingResponse

# ─── Logging ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

logging.basicConfig(
    level=logging.INFO,
    format="%(asctime)s  [%(levelname)s]  %(message)s",
)
log = logging.getLogger("linkpi")

# ─── Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

LINKPI_DIR          = Path(os.environ.get("LINKPI_DIR", Path.home() / ".linkpi"))
SESSION_IDLE_TIMEOUT = 1800   # seconds; idle non-active providers are reaped
EVENT_READ_TIMEOUT   = 120    # seconds; max wait for next streaming event
COMPACT_TIMEOUT      = 300    # seconds; max wait for compact command response

# Map from model ID (as sent by OpenCode) to pi --provider value.
# OpenCode may prefix model IDs with "openai/" – _parse_provider strips that.
MODEL_TO_PROVIDER: dict[str, str] = {
    "pi-anthropic":  "anthropic",
    "pi-openai":     "openai",
    "pi-google":     "google",
    "pi-groq":       "groq",
    "pi-mistral":    "mistral",
    "pi-bedrock":    "bedrock",
    "pi-vertex":     "vertex",
    "pi-openrouter": "openrouter",
    "pi-local":      "local-llm",  # local vLLM/Ollama (models.json)
    "pi-agent":      "pi-agent",   # pi chooses provider
}


# ─── SharedMemory ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class SharedMemory:
    """
    Persists cross-provider handoff summaries as markdown files.

    Directory layout:
      ~/.linkpi/
        memory.md               ← active shared context (injected into new sessions)
        summaries/
          <provider>-<ts>.md    ← individual compact snapshots, one per switch
    """

    def __init__(self, base: Path = LINKPI_DIR) -> None:
        self._base          = base
        self._memory_file   = base / "memory.md"
        self._summaries_dir = base / "summaries"
        self._base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        self._summaries_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)

    def get(self) -> str:
        """Return current shared memory, or '' if none exists yet."""
        return self._memory_file.read_text("utf-8").strip() \
               if self._memory_file.exists() else ""

    def set(self, content: str) -> None:
        self._memory_file.write_text(content, "utf-8")
        log.info("SharedMemory updated  chars=%d", len(content))

    def add_provider_summary(self, provider: str, summary: str) -> None:
        """
        Append *summary* (from a compact command) to memory.md and save
        a dated snapshot under summaries/.
        """
        if not summary.strip():
            return
        ts   = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d-%H%M%S")
        snap = self._summaries_dir / f"{provider}-{ts}.md"
        snap.write_text(summary, "utf-8")

        existing = self.get()
        section  = f"\n\n## [{provider}]  {ts}\n\n{summary.strip()}"
        self.set((existing + section).strip())
        log.info("Added summary  provider=%s  chars=%d", provider, len(summary))

    def get_all_snapshots(self) -> list[tuple[str, str]]:
        """Return [(provider, content), …] sorted by filename (chronological)."""
        out = []
        for f in sorted(self._summaries_dir.glob("*.md")):
            # filename: "<provider>-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.md"
            provider = "-".join(f.stem.split("-")[:-2]) or f.stem
            out.append((provider, f.read_text("utf-8")))
        return out


# ─── PiProcess ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class PiProcess:
    """
    One pi --mode rpc subprocess.

    stdout reader splits output into two lanes:
      • event_queue   – agent events (message_update, agent_end, …)
      • _pending      – command responses, keyed by id, resolved via Future

    This lets send_command() await a response synchronously while the
    caller independently drains event_queue for streaming output.
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        provider: str,
        process:  asyncio.subprocess.Process,
    ) -> None:
        self.provider:           str                      = provider
        self.process:            asyncio.subprocess.Process = process
        self.event_queue:        asyncio.Queue            = asyncio.Queue()
        self.user_message_count: int                      = 0
        self.last_used:          float                    = time.time()
        self.lock:               asyncio.Lock             = asyncio.Lock()
        self._pending:           dict[str, asyncio.Future] = {}
        self._reader_task:       asyncio.Task             = asyncio.create_task(
            self._read_loop()
        )

    # ── factory ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    @classmethod
    async def spawn(cls, provider: str, cmd: list[str]) -> "PiProcess":
        log.info("Spawn  provider=%-12s  cmd=%s", provider, " ".join(cmd))
        try:
            proc = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
                *cmd,
                stdin=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
                stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
                stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
            )
        except (FileNotFoundError, PermissionError) as exc:
            raise RuntimeError(
                f"Cannot start pi: {exc}\n"
                f"  command tried: {cmd[0]}\n"
                f"  tip: use --pi-cmd to specify the full path, e.g. --pi-cmd pi.cmd (Windows)"
            ) from exc
        return cls(provider, proc)

    # ── reader ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    async def _read_loop(self) -> None:
        assert self.process.stdout
        buf = b""
        try:
            while True:
                chunk = await self.process.stdout.read(8192)
                if not chunk:
                    break
                buf += chunk
                while b"\n" in buf:
                    raw, buf = buf.split(b"\n", 1)
                    raw = raw.rstrip(b"\r")
                    if not raw:
                        continue
                    try:
                        msg = json.loads(raw.decode("utf-8", errors="replace"))
                    except json.JSONDecodeError:
                        continue

                    # Command responses (have matching id) → resolve Future
                    if msg.get("type") == "response" and "id" in msg:
                        fut = self._pending.get(msg["id"])
                        if fut and not fut.done():
                            fut.set_result(msg)
                        continue   # do NOT also push to event_queue

                    # Everything else (events) → event_queue
                    await self.event_queue.put(msg)

        except Exception as exc:
            log.error("reader crashed  provider=%s  %s", self.provider, exc)
        finally:
            await self.event_queue.put(None)   # sentinel

    # ── command helper ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    async def send_command(self, cmd: dict, timeout: float = 30.0) -> dict:
        """
        Send *cmd* to pi stdin and await the correlated response by id.
        Raises TimeoutError if no response arrives within *timeout* seconds.
        """
        cid       = uuid.uuid4().hex
        cmd       = {**cmd, "id": cid}
        loop      = asyncio.get_running_loop()
        fut: asyncio.Future = loop.create_future()
        self._pending[cid]  = fut

        assert self.process.stdin
        self.process.stdin.write((json.dumps(cmd) + "\n").encode())
        await self.process.stdin.drain()

        try:
            return await asyncio.wait_for(asyncio.shield(fut), timeout=timeout)
        except asyncio.TimeoutError:
            raise TimeoutError(
                f"Command '{cmd.get('type')}' timed out after {timeout}s"
            )
        finally:
            self._pending.pop(cid, None)

    # ── memory compaction ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    async def compact_for_memory(self) -> str:
        """
        Request a compact on this session and return the summary text.
        The summary is suitable for handoff to another AI provider.
        Returns '' on failure or if the session is too short to compact.
        """
        instructions = (
            "Create a concise handoff summary for another AI assistant "
            "that will continue this work.  Cover: "
            "(1) project context and goals, "
            "(2) key decisions and their rationale, "
            "(3) code and architectural changes made, "
            "(4) current state and the most important next steps.  "
            "Be specific and actionable."
        )
        try:
            resp = await self.send_command(
                {"type": "compact", "customInstructions": instructions},
                timeout=COMPACT_TIMEOUT,
            )
            if resp.get("success"):
                return resp.get("data", {}).get("summary", "")
            log.warning(
                "compact failed  provider=%s  error=%s",
                self.provider, resp.get("error"),
            )
        except Exception as exc:
            log.warning("compact_for_memory error  provider=%s  %s", self.provider, exc)
        return ""

    # ── lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    async def terminate(self) -> None:
        self._reader_task.cancel()
        try:
            self.process.terminate()
            await asyncio.wait_for(self.process.wait(), timeout=5)
        except Exception:
            self.process.kill()
        log.info("Terminated  provider=%s", self.provider)


# ─── Platform helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def _resolve_cmd(pi_cmd: str) -> str:
    """
    On Windows, npm global scripts are .cmd wrappers.  Python's
    asyncio.create_subprocess_exec uses CreateProcess directly and cannot
    execute .cmd files without going through cmd.exe, but shutil.which()
    honours PATHEXT and returns the full .cmd path which CreateProcess
    accepts on modern Windows (8+).

    Falls back to the original string if resolution fails so the user
    gets a clear FileNotFoundError rather than a silent hang.
    """
    resolved = shutil.which(pi_cmd)
    if resolved:
        return resolved
    if sys.platform == "win32":
        resolved = shutil.which(pi_cmd + ".cmd")
        if resolved:
            return resolved
    return pi_cmd   # let spawn() raise FileNotFoundError with a clear message


# ─── ProviderRegistry ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class ProviderRegistry:
    """
    Owns one PiProcess per provider.

    When the active provider changes (detected by comparing the model field
    across requests), the outgoing session is compacted and its summary is
    appended to SharedMemory before the incoming session is started.
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        pi_cmd:  str,
        pi_extra: list[str],
        memory:  SharedMemory,
    ) -> None:
        self._pi_cmd   = pi_cmd
        self._pi_extra = pi_extra
        self.memory    = memory
        self._procs:   dict[str, PiProcess]   = {}
        self._active:  Optional[str]          = None
        self._sw_lock: asyncio.Lock           = asyncio.Lock()
        self._gc_task: Optional[asyncio.Task] = None

    async def start(self) -> None:
        self._gc_task = asyncio.create_task(self._gc_loop())
        log.info("ProviderRegistry ready  memory=%s", self.memory._memory_file)

    async def stop(self) -> None:
        if self._gc_task:
            self._gc_task.cancel()
        for p in list(self._procs.values()):
            await p.terminate()

    async def get(self, provider: str) -> PiProcess:
        """
        Return the PiProcess for *provider*.
        If *provider* differs from the currently active one, compact the
        outgoing session and update shared memory first.
        """
        async with self._sw_lock:
            if self._active and self._active != provider:
                await self._handle_switch(self._active, provider)

            if provider not in self._procs:
                self._procs[provider] = await self._spawn(provider)

            self._active            = provider
            self._procs[provider].last_used = time.time()
            return self._procs[provider]

    # ── internals ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    async def _spawn(self, provider: str) -> PiProcess:
        session_dir = LINKPI_DIR / "sessions" / provider
        session_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

        cmd = [_resolve_cmd(self._pi_cmd), "--mode", "rpc", "--session-dir", str(session_dir)]
        if provider != "pi-agent":
            cmd += ["--provider", provider]
        cmd += self._pi_extra

        return await PiProcess.spawn(provider, cmd)

    async def _handle_switch(self, from_p: str, to_p: str) -> None:
        """
        Compact the outgoing provider's session and update SharedMemory.
        Called while _sw_lock is held, so the switch is atomic.
        """
        log.info("Provider switch  %s → %s", from_p, to_p)
        old = self._procs.get(from_p)
        if old and old.user_message_count > 0:
            log.info("Compacting outgoing session  provider=%s …", from_p)
            summary = await old.compact_for_memory()
            if summary:
                self.memory.add_provider_summary(from_p, summary)
            else:
                log.info("No summary produced (session may be too short)")

    async def _gc_loop(self) -> None:
        """Reap idle non-active sessions."""
        while True:
            await asyncio.sleep(60)
            now   = time.time()
            stale = [
                p for p in list(self._procs.values())
                if p.provider != self._active
                and now - p.last_used > SESSION_IDLE_TIMEOUT
            ]
            for p in stale:
                log.info("GC  provider=%s", p.provider)
                self._procs.pop(p.provider, None)
                await p.terminate()


# ─── Conversation-history helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────

def _text(content: object) -> str:
    if isinstance(content, str):
        return content
    if isinstance(content, list):
        return " ".join(
            b.get("text", "")
            for b in content
            if isinstance(b, dict) and b.get("type") == "text"
        )
    return str(content)


def _last_user_text(messages: list[dict]) -> str:
    for m in reversed(messages):
        if m.get("role") == "user":
            return _text(m.get("content", ""))
    return ""


def _history_block(messages: list[dict]) -> str:
    """Format all messages before the last user turn as a readable block."""
    prior: list[dict] = []
    found = False
    for m in reversed(messages):
        if not found and m.get("role") == "user":
            found = True
            continue
        prior.append(m)
    prior.reverse()
    if not prior:
        return ""
    lines = ["[Previous conversation]"]
    for m in prior:
        lines.append(f"{m.get('role','?').capitalize()}: {_text(m.get('content',''))}")
    lines.append("[End previous conversation]")
    return "\n".join(lines)


def _tool_label(name: str, args: dict) -> str:
    if name == "bash":
        return f"bash `{args.get('command','')[:60].replace(chr(10),' ')}`"
    if name in ("read", "write", "edit"):
        return f"{name} {args.get('path', args.get('file_path',''))}"
    return name


# ─── OpenAI SSE helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def _sse(text: str, cid: str, finish: Optional[str] = None) -> str:
    payload = {
        "id":      f"chatcmpl-{cid}",
        "object":  "chat.completion.chunk",
        "created": int(time.time()),
        "model":   "pi-agent",
        "choices": [{
            "index":         0,
            "delta":         {"content": text} if (text and not finish) else {},
            "finish_reason": finish,
        }],
    }
    return f"data: {json.dumps(payload)}\n\n"


# ─── Core streaming generator ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

async def _stream_prompt(
    proc:   PiProcess,
    prompt: str,
    cid:    str,
) -> AsyncIterator[str]:
    """
    Send *prompt* to pi and yield OpenAI SSE chunks until agent_end.
    Must be called while proc.lock is held.
    """
    # Send the prompt; the ack response is routed to a Future via send_command,
    # not to the event_queue, so it won't interfere with streaming.
    await proc.send_command({"type": "prompt", "message": prompt}, timeout=60)
    proc.user_message_count += 1
    log.info(
        "Prompt sent  provider=%-12s  turn=%d  len=%d",
        proc.provider, proc.user_message_count, len(prompt),
    )

    try:
        while True:
            try:
                event: Optional[dict] = await asyncio.wait_for(
                    proc.event_queue.get(), timeout=EVENT_READ_TIMEOUT
                )
            except asyncio.TimeoutError:
                yield _sse("\n\n*[LinkPi: timeout waiting for pi]*", cid)
                break

            if event is None:
                log.warning("Pi process ended  provider=%s", proc.provider)
                break

            et = event.get("type", "")

            if et == "message_update":
                ae = event.get("assistantMessageEvent", {})
                if ae.get("type") == "text_delta" and (delta := ae.get("delta", "")):
                    yield _sse(delta, cid)

            elif et == "tool_execution_start":
                label = _tool_label(event.get("toolName", "?"), event.get("args", {}))
                yield _sse(f"\n\n*[▶ {label}]*\n", cid)

            elif et == "tool_execution_end":
                name   = event.get("toolName", "?")
                mark   = "✗" if event.get("isError") else "✓"
                yield _sse(f"*[{mark} {name}]*\n\n", cid)

            elif et == "agent_end":
                log.info("Agent done  provider=%s", proc.provider)
                break

            elif et == "compaction_end":
                log.info("Context compacted  provider=%s", proc.provider)

            elif et == "auto_retry_start":
                yield _sse(f"\n*[retry {event.get('attempt')}…]*\n", cid)

    except Exception as exc:
        log.exception("Stream error  provider=%s", proc.provider)
        yield _sse(f"\n\n*[LinkPi error: {exc}]*", cid)

    yield _sse("", cid, finish="stop")
    yield "data: [DONE]\n\n"


def _locked_stream(proc: PiProcess, prompt: str, cid: str) -> AsyncIterator[str]:
    """Wrap _stream_prompt so proc.lock is held for the whole round-trip."""
    async def _gen() -> AsyncIterator[str]:
        async with proc.lock:
            async for chunk in _stream_prompt(proc, prompt, cid):
                yield chunk
    return _gen()


# ─── Memory consolidation ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

async def _consolidate(
    pi_cmd:  str,
    pi_extra: list[str],
    memory:  SharedMemory,
) -> str:
    """
    Spawn a temporary pi session, feed it all provider summaries, and ask
    it to produce a unified memory document.  The result replaces memory.md.
    """
    snapshots = memory.get_all_snapshots()
    if not snapshots:
        return ""

    sections = [f"### {p}\n{c.strip()}" for p, c in snapshots]
    prompt = (
        "Below are handoff summaries from coding sessions using different "
        "AI providers.  Synthesise them into a single, coherent memory "
        "document that covers:\n"
        "- Project goals and overall context\n"
        "- Key decisions and rationale\n"
        "- Code and architectural changes\n"
        "- Current state and next steps\n\n"
        "Summaries:\n\n" + "\n\n".join(sections) + "\n\n"
        "Produce the unified memory document now."
    )

    cmd  = [_resolve_cmd(pi_cmd), "--mode", "rpc", "--no-session"] + pi_extra
    proc = await PiProcess.spawn("consolidation", cmd)
    text = ""
    try:
        await proc.send_command({"type": "prompt", "message": prompt}, timeout=60)
        while True:
            event = await asyncio.wait_for(proc.event_queue.get(), timeout=120)
            if event is None:
                break
            et = event.get("type", "")
            if et == "message_update":
                ae = event.get("assistantMessageEvent", {})
                if ae.get("type") == "text_delta":
                    text += ae.get("delta", "")
            elif et == "agent_end":
                break
    finally:
        await proc.terminate()

    return text


# ─── FastAPI app factory ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def _parse_provider(model_str: str) -> str:
    """
    OpenCode sends only the model ID (not the provider prefix):
      "pi-anthropic"  →  "anthropic"
      "pi-openai"     →  "openai"
      "pi-agent"      →  "pi-agent"
    Falls back to "pi-agent" for unrecognised values.
    """
    return MODEL_TO_PROVIDER.get(model_str, "pi-agent")


def create_app(pi_cmd: str, pi_extra: list[str]) -> FastAPI:
    memory   = SharedMemory()
    registry = ProviderRegistry(pi_cmd, pi_extra, memory)

    @asynccontextmanager
    async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
        await registry.start()
        yield
        await registry.stop()

    app = FastAPI(title="LinkPi", version="2.0.0", lifespan=lifespan)

    # ── GET /v1/models ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    @app.get("/v1/models")
    async def list_models() -> JSONResponse:
        return JSONResponse({
            "object": "list",
            "data": [
                {
                    "id":       model_id,
                    "object":   "model",
                    "created":  0,
                    "owned_by": "pi-mono",
                }
                for model_id in MODEL_TO_PROVIDER
            ],
        })

    # ── POST /v1/chat/completions ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    @app.post("/v1/chat/completions", response_model=None)
    async def chat(request: Request) -> StreamingResponse | JSONResponse:
        body:      dict       = await request.json()
        messages:  list[dict] = body.get("messages", [])
        do_stream: bool       = body.get("stream", True)
        provider:  str        = _parse_provider(body.get("model", "pi-agent"))

        if not messages:
            return JSONResponse({"error": "messages is empty"}, status_code=400)

        try:
            proc = await registry.get(provider)
        except Exception as exc:
            log.exception("Failed to get pi process  provider=%s", provider)
            return JSONResponse({"error": str(exc)}, status_code=503)

        # ── build prompt for pi ───────────────────────────────────────────────
        user_msgs = [m for m in messages if m.get("role") == "user"]
        pi_count  = proc.user_message_count
        req_count = len(user_msgs)

        if pi_count == 0:
            # First turn: inject shared memory + any prior OpenCode history
            mem_ctx   = memory.get()
            hist_ctx  = _history_block(messages) if req_count > 1 else ""
            user_text = _last_user_text(messages)

            parts = []
            if mem_ctx:
                parts.append(
                    "[Shared memory from previous sessions]\n"
                    + mem_ctx
                    + "\n[End shared memory]"
                )
            if hist_ctx:
                parts.append(hist_ctx)
            parts.append(user_text)
            prompt = "\n\n".join(parts)

        else:
            # Ongoing session: forward only messages pi has not seen yet
            new_turns = user_msgs[pi_count:]
            if not new_turns:
                # Defensive: same last turn resent (e.g. OpenCode retry)
                new_turns = [user_msgs[-1]]
                proc.user_message_count = max(0, proc.user_message_count - 1)
            prompt = "\n\n".join(_text(m.get("content", "")) for m in new_turns)

        cid = uuid.uuid4().hex
        log.info(
            "Chat  provider=%-12s  pi_turns=%d→%d  prompt_len=%d",
            provider, pi_count, req_count, len(prompt),
        )

        if do_stream:
            return StreamingResponse(
                _locked_stream(proc, prompt, cid),
                media_type="text/event-stream",
                headers={"Cache-Control": "no-cache", "X-Accel-Buffering": "no"},
            )

        # Non-streaming: collect then wrap
        full = ""
        async with proc.lock:
            async for raw in _stream_prompt(proc, prompt, cid):
                if raw.startswith("data: {"):
                    try:
                        full += json.loads(raw[6:])["choices"][0]["delta"].get(
                            "content", ""
                        )
                    except Exception:
                        pass

        return JSONResponse({
            "id":      f"chatcmpl-{cid}",
            "object":  "chat.completion",
            "created": int(time.time()),
            "model":   body.get("model", "pi-agent"),
            "choices": [{
                "index":         0,
                "message":       {"role": "assistant", "content": full},
                "finish_reason": "stop",
            }],
            "usage": {"prompt_tokens": 0, "completion_tokens": 0, "total_tokens": 0},
        })

    # ── POST /v1/consolidate ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    @app.post("/v1/consolidate")
    async def consolidate() -> JSONResponse:
        """
        Ask pi to synthesise all provider summaries into a single unified
        memory document.  The result replaces ~/.linkpi/memory.md and will
        be injected into any new session from this point on.
        """
        result = await _consolidate(pi_cmd, pi_extra, memory)
        if result:
            memory.set(result)
            return JSONResponse({"status": "consolidated", "chars": len(result)})
        return JSONResponse({"status": "nothing_to_consolidate"})

    # ── GET /v1/memory ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    @app.get("/v1/memory")
    async def get_memory() -> JSONResponse:
        """Inspect current shared memory and snapshot count."""
        return JSONResponse({
            "memory":         memory.get(),
            "snapshot_count": len(memory.get_all_snapshots()),
            "memory_file":    str(memory._memory_file),
        })

    return app


# ─── Entry point ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main() -> None:
    p = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="LinkPi v2 – pi-mono OpenAI bridge with cross-provider memory"
    )
    p.add_argument("--host",     default="127.0.0.1")
    p.add_argument("--port",     type=int, default=8765)
    p.add_argument("--pi-cmd",   default="pi",
                   help="path to the pi executable (default: pi)")
    p.add_argument("--model",    default=None,
                   help="default model inside pi, e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4")
    p.add_argument("--thinking", default=None,
                   choices=["off", "minimal", "low", "medium", "high", "xhigh"])
    args = p.parse_args()

    extra: list[str] = []
    if args.model:
        extra += ["--model", args.model]
    if args.thinking:
        extra += ["--thinking", args.thinking]

    log.info("=" * 64)
    log.info("LinkPi v2  –  pi-mono OpenAI bridge + cross-provider memory")
    log.info("Listening:      http://%s:%d", args.host, args.port)
    log.info("Pi command:     %s %s", args.pi_cmd, " ".join(extra))
    log.info("Memory store:   %s", LINKPI_DIR)
    log.info("")
    log.info("opencode.json  (place next to your project or in ~/.config/opencode/):")
    log.info(
        json.dumps({
            "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.schema.json",
            "model":   "link-pi/pi-agent",
            "provider": {
                "link-pi": {
                    "options": {
                        "baseURL": f"http://{args.host}:{args.port}/v1",
                        "apiKey":  "local",
                    },
                    "models": {
                        mid: {"name": f"Pi \u2192 {mid.removeprefix('pi-').capitalize()}"}
                        for mid in MODEL_TO_PROVIDER
                    },
                }
            },
        }, indent=2)
    )
    log.info("")
    log.info("Available models (switch in OpenCode model selector Ctrl+M):")
    for mid in MODEL_TO_PROVIDER:
        log.info("  link-pi/%s", mid)
    log.info("")
    log.info("Extra endpoints:")
    log.info("  POST http://%s:%d/v1/consolidate  – synthesise unified memory",
             args.host, args.port)
    log.info("  GET  http://%s:%d/v1/memory       – inspect current memory",
             args.host, args.port)
    log.info("=" * 64)

    uvicorn.run(create_app(args.pi_cmd, extra), host=args.host, port=args.port)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""
pi RPC client - persistent subprocess communicating via JSONL protocol.

One pi process is kept alive for the lifetime of the application.
All prompt() calls are serialized (one at a time) so multiple LINE users
are queued rather than sent in parallel to the same session.

If the pi process dies unexpectedly it is automatically restarted on the
next call.
"""

import json
import logging
import queue
import subprocess
import threading
import time
import uuid

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

_RESTART_DELAY = 3  # seconds to wait before restarting a dead process


class PiRpcClient:
    """
    Wraps a long-running `pi --mode rpc` subprocess.

    Usage:
        client = PiRpcClient(
            base_cmd=["node", "/path/to/cli.js"],
            env={...},
            provider="anthropic",
            timeout=300,
        )
        response = client.prompt("Hello!")
        response = client.prompt("Describe this image", images=[{
            "type": "image", "data": "<base64>", "mimeType": "image/jpeg"
        }])
        client.close()
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        base_cmd: list[str],
        env: dict[str, str],
        timeout: int = 300,
    ) -> None:
        self._base_cmd = base_cmd
        self._env = env
        self._timeout = timeout
        self._lock = threading.Lock()
        self._proc: subprocess.Popen | None = None
        self._event_queue: queue.Queue = queue.Queue()
        self._start_process()

    # ── Process lifecycle ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def _build_cmd(self) -> list[str]:
        cmd = self._base_cmd + [
            "--mode", "rpc",
        ]
        return cmd

    def _start_process(self) -> None:
        cmd = self._build_cmd()
        logger.info("Starting pi RPC process: %s", " ".join(cmd))
        self._proc = subprocess.Popen(
            cmd,
            stdin=subprocess.PIPE,
            stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
            stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
            text=True,
            bufsize=1,
            env=self._env,
        )
        # Drain stale events from previous process (if any)
        while not self._event_queue.empty():
            try:
                self._event_queue.get_nowait()
            except queue.Empty:
                break

        threading.Thread(
            target=self._read_stdout, daemon=True, name="pi-rpc-stdout"
        ).start()
        threading.Thread(
            target=self._drain_stderr, daemon=True, name="pi-rpc-stderr"
        ).start()

        logger.info("pi RPC process started (pid=%d)", self._proc.pid)

        # Enable auto-compaction so long sessions don't hit context window limits
        self._send_raw({"type": "set_auto_compaction", "enabled": True})

    def _read_stdout(self) -> None:
        assert self._proc is not None
        try:
            for raw in self._proc.stdout:
                line = raw.rstrip("\r\n")
                if not line:
                    continue
                try:
                    self._event_queue.put(json.loads(line))
                except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
                    logger.warning("pi RPC bad JSON: %s | %s", line[:120], exc)
        finally:
            self._event_queue.put(None)  # EOF sentinel

    def _drain_stderr(self) -> None:
        assert self._proc is not None
        for raw in self._proc.stderr:
            line = raw.rstrip()
            if line:
                logger.warning("pi RPC stderr: %s", line)

    def is_alive(self) -> bool:
        return self._proc is not None and self._proc.poll() is None

    def _ensure_alive(self) -> None:
        if not self.is_alive():
            logger.warning("pi RPC process is dead - restarting in %ds", _RESTART_DELAY)
            time.sleep(_RESTART_DELAY)
            self._start_process()

    # ── Communication ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def _send_raw(self, cmd: dict) -> None:
        """Write a single JSONL command to pi stdin (no lock)."""
        assert self._proc and self._proc.stdin
        self._proc.stdin.write(json.dumps(cmd) + "\n")
        self._proc.stdin.flush()

    # ── Public API ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def prompt(
        self,
        message: str,
        images: list[dict] | None = None,
        timeout: int | None = None,
    ) -> str:
        """
        Send a prompt to the pi agent and return the complete text response.
        Blocks until the agent_end event is received.

        Args:
            message:  User prompt text.
            images:   Optional list of image dicts:
                      [{"type": "image", "data": "<base64>", "mimeType": "image/jpeg"}]
            timeout:  Override the default timeout (seconds).

        Returns:
            The assistant's full text response.

        Raises:
            TimeoutError:   Agent did not respond within the timeout.
            RuntimeError:   pi process exited or returned an RPC error.
        """
        effective_timeout = timeout if timeout is not None else self._timeout

        with self._lock:
            self._ensure_alive()

            cmd: dict = {"type": "prompt", "message": message}
            if images:
                cmd["images"] = images
            self._send_raw(cmd)

            text_parts: list[str] = []
            deadline = time.monotonic() + effective_timeout
            # Tracks an error message from a failed agent_end that may be retried.
            # pi emits agent_end *before* auto_retry_start, so we must not break
            # immediately on an error agent_end - we wait briefly to confirm whether
            # a retry follows.
            pending_error_msg: str | None = None

            while True:
                remaining = deadline - time.monotonic()
                if remaining <= 0:
                    # pi process is still running - restart so next call works
                    logger.warning(
                        "pi agent timed out after %ds - restarting process",
                        effective_timeout,
                    )
                    try:
                        if self._proc:
                            self._proc.terminate()
                            self._proc.wait(timeout=3)
                    except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
                        pass
                    self._proc = None
                    self._start_process()
                    raise TimeoutError(
                        f"pi agent timed out after {effective_timeout}s"
                    )

                # Use a short timeout while waiting to confirm auto_retry_start so
                # we don't hang forever if auto-retry is disabled on the pi side.
                wait_timeout = 1.0 if pending_error_msg is not None else 5.0
                try:
                    event = self._event_queue.get(timeout=min(remaining, wait_timeout))
                except queue.Empty:
                    if pending_error_msg is not None:
                        # No auto_retry_start arrived - retry is disabled.
                        text_parts = [pending_error_msg]
                        break
                    if not self.is_alive():
                        raise RuntimeError("pi process exited unexpectedly during prompt")
                    continue

                if event is None:
                    raise RuntimeError("pi process stdout closed unexpectedly")

                etype = event.get("type")

                if etype == "message_update":
                    delta = event.get("assistantMessageEvent", {})
                    if delta.get("type") == "text_delta":
                        text_parts.append(delta["delta"])

                elif etype == "agent_end":
                    messages = event.get("messages", [])
                    last_assistant = next(
                        (m for m in reversed(messages) if m.get("role") == "assistant"),
                        None,
                    )
                    is_error = (
                        last_assistant is not None
                        and last_assistant.get("stopReason") == "error"
                    )
                    if is_error:
                        # May be followed by auto_retry_start — don't break yet.
                        err_msg = last_assistant.get("errorMessage", "Unknown error")
                        logger.warning("pi RPC error agent_end: %s", err_msg[:120])

                        # ── 特殊處理：JSON 控制字元錯誤 ──────────────────────────
                        # 原因：session context 中含有原始控制字元（ASCII 0x00-0x1F）
                        # 導致 Anthropic streaming JSON 解析失敗。
                        # 解法：清除整個 session（重啟 pi 進程），再重試一次。
                        if "control character" in err_msg or "Bad control" in err_msg:
                            logger.warning(
                                "偵測到 JSON 控制字元錯誤，自動重置 session 並重試…"
                            )
                            # 重啟 pi 進程（清除所有 session 上下文）
                            try:
                                if self._proc:
                                    self._proc.terminate()
                                    self._proc.wait(timeout=3)
                            except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
                                pass
                            self._proc = None
                            self._start_process()
                            # 重新發送原始 prompt（新的乾淨 session）
                            retry_notice = (
                                "⚠️ 偵測到對話記憶中含有特殊字元，已自動重置並重試。\n"
                                "（注意：對話歷史已清除，請重新描述您的需求）\n\n"
                            )
                            self._send_raw(cmd)
                            text_parts = [retry_notice]
                            pending_error_msg = None
                            deadline = time.monotonic() + effective_timeout
                            continue
                        # ── 其他錯誤 ────────────────────────────────────────────
                        pending_error_msg = f"[錯誤：{err_msg}]"
                        text_parts = []  # discard any partial content
                    else:
                        break  # successful end

                elif etype == "response" and not event.get("success"):
                    raise RuntimeError(
                        f"pi RPC error: {event.get('error', 'unknown')}"
                    )

                elif etype == "auto_retry_start":
                    # Retry confirmed - clear the pending error and wait for result.
                    pending_error_msg = None
                    text_parts = []
                    logger.info(
                        "pi RPC auto-retry attempt %s/%s: %s",
                        event.get("attempt"),
                        event.get("maxAttempts"),
                        event.get("errorMessage", "")[:80],
                    )

                elif etype == "auto_retry_end":
                    pending_error_msg = None
                    if not event.get("success"):
                        err_msg = event.get("finalError", "Unknown final error")
                        text_parts = [f"[重試失敗:{err_msg}]"]
                        break  # no further agent_end will arrive after a failed retry

                elif etype == "compaction_start":
                    logger.info("pi RPC compaction started (%s)", event.get("reason"))

                elif etype == "compaction_end":
                    logger.info("pi RPC compaction done")

            result = "".join(text_parts).strip()
            return result if result else "(pi agent 無輸出)"

    # ── One-shot command API ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def send_command(self, cmd: dict, timeout: int = 30) -> dict:
        """
        Send a one-shot RPC command and wait for its response.
        Serialised with prompt() via self._lock.

        Returns the full response dict, e.g.:
          {"type": "response", "id": "...", "command": "set_model",
           "success": True, "data": {...}}

        Raises TimeoutError or RuntimeError on failure.
        """
        cmd = dict(cmd)  # copy — don't mutate caller's dict
        cmd["id"] = str(uuid.uuid4())
        cmd_id = cmd["id"]

        with self._lock:
            self._ensure_alive()
            self._send_raw(cmd)

            deadline = time.monotonic() + timeout
            while True:
                remaining = deadline - time.monotonic()
                if remaining <= 0:
                    raise TimeoutError(
                        f"Command '{cmd.get('type')}' timed out after {timeout}s"
                    )
                try:
                    event = self._event_queue.get(timeout=min(remaining, 5.0))
                except queue.Empty:
                    if not self.is_alive():
                        raise RuntimeError("pi process died during command")
                    continue

                if event is None:
                    raise RuntimeError("pi process stdout closed unexpectedly")

                # Match by correlation id
                if event.get("type") == "response" and event.get("id") == cmd_id:
                    return event

                # Any other event (stale compaction_start, etc.) — silently discard
                logger.debug("send_command: discard event type=%s", event.get("type"))

    def get_available_models(self) -> list[dict]:
        """Return list of all models available to the running pi session."""
        resp = self.send_command({"type": "get_available_models"})
        if not resp.get("success"):
            raise RuntimeError(f"get_available_models failed: {resp.get('error')}")
        return resp.get("data", {}).get("models", [])

    def get_current_model(self) -> dict | None:
        """Return the model currently active in the pi session."""
        resp = self.send_command({"type": "get_state"})
        if not resp.get("success"):
            raise RuntimeError(f"get_state failed: {resp.get('error')}")
        return resp.get("data", {}).get("model")

    def set_model(self, provider: str, model_id: str) -> dict:
        """
        Switch the pi session to a different provider/model.
        Returns the activated model dict on success.
        Raises RuntimeError if the model is not found or unavailable.
        """
        resp = self.send_command({
            "type": "set_model",
            "provider": provider,
            "modelId": model_id,
        })
        if not resp.get("success"):
            raise RuntimeError(resp.get("error", "set_model failed"))
        return resp.get("data") or {}

    def reset_session(self) -> None:
        """
        清除所有對話歷史記錄。

        做法:在 lock 保護下終止現有 pi 行程,再重新啟動一個
        全新的 pi --mode rpc 子行程,等同於開啟一個全新 session。
        之後的 prompt() 呼叫將不含任何先前的對話上下文。
        """
        with self._lock:
            logger.info("pi RPC reset_session: terminating old process...")
            if self._proc:
                try:
                    self._proc.stdin.close()
                except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
                    pass
                try:
                    self._proc.terminate()
                    self._proc.wait(timeout=5)
                except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
                    try:
                        self._proc.kill()
                    except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
                        pass
                self._proc = None
            # Drain any stale events left in the queue
            while not self._event_queue.empty():
                try:
                    self._event_queue.get_nowait()
                except queue.Empty:
                    break
            self._start_process()
            logger.info("pi RPC reset_session: new session started")

    def close(self) -> None:
        """Gracefully terminate the pi subprocess."""
        if self._proc:
            try:
                self._proc.stdin.close()
                self._proc.terminate()
                self._proc.wait(timeout=5)
            except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
                pass
            self._proc = None
            logger.info("pi RPC process closed")

import os
import json
import logging
import pathlib
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from pi_rpc import PiRpcClient

# Configure logging
logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO, format="%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(message)s")
logger = logging.getLogger("memory_summarizer")

# Constants
LINKPI_DIR = pathlib.Path(os.environ.get("LINKPI_DIR", pathlib.Path.home() / ".linkpi"))
SESSIONS_DIR = LINKPI_DIR / "sessions"

def get_recent_sessions(hours=24):
    """Get all session .jsonl files modified in the last X hours."""
    recent_files = []
    cutoff = datetime.now() - timedelta(hours=hours)
    
    if not SESSIONS_DIR.exists():
        logger.warning(f"Sessions directory {SESSIONS_DIR} does not exist.")
        return []

    for provider_dir in SESSIONS_DIR.iterdir():
        if provider_dir.is_dir():
            for f in provider_dir.glob("*.jsonl"):
                mtime = datetime.fromtimestamp(f.stat().st_mtime)
                if mtime > cutoff:
                    recent_files.append(f)
    
    return recent_files

def extract_conversation(file_path):
    """Extract user and assistant text from a pi session .jsonl file."""
    conv = []
    try:
        with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                try:
                    data = json.loads(line)
                    if data.get("type") == "message":
                        msg = data.get("message", {})
                        role = msg.get("role")
                        content = msg.get("content", [])
                        
                        # Extract text from content list
                        text = ""
                        if isinstance(content, list):
                            for item in content:
                                if isinstance(item, dict) and item.get("type") == "text":
                                    text += item.get("text", "")
                                elif isinstance(item, str):
                                    text += item
                        elif isinstance(content, str):
                            text = content
                        
                        if role in ("user", "assistant") and text:
                            conv.append(f"{role}: {text}")
                except json.JSONDecodeError:
                    continue
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Error reading {file_path}: {e}")
    
    return "\n".join(conv)

def summarize_sessions(client: PiRpcClient, session_files):
    """Summarize each session and extract candidate memories."""
    all_candidates = []
    
    for f in session_files:
        conv = extract_conversation(f)
        if not conv:
            continue
        
        prompt = (
            "Below is a recording of a conversation between a user (Johnny) and an AI assistant (小白).\n"
            "Please analyze this conversation and extract any NEW information that should be stored in the assistant's long-term memory.\n"
            "This includes:\n"
            "- User preferences (e.g., 'I prefer low-carb dinners')\n"
            "- Personal facts (e.g., 'I live in Taichung')\n"
            "- Specific goals (e.g., 'I want to pass the TOEIC 500 test')\n"
            "- Important project decisions or architectural choices\n"
            "- Health-related constraints (e.g., 'Reduce salt for kidney health')\n\n"
            "Format the output as a bulleted list. If nothing new is found, simply say 'No new memory candidates'.\n\n"
            f"Conversation:\n---\n{conv}\n---\n\n"
            "Memory Candidates:"
        )
        
        try:
            summary = client.prompt(prompt)
            if "No new memory candidates" not in summary:
                all_candidates.append(f"From session {f.name}:\n{summary}")
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Error summarizing {f.name}: {e}")
            
    return "\n\n".join(all_candidates) if all_candidates else None

"""
PiBot - LINE Bot with pi agent integration

Architecture:
  Webhook → signature verify → ThreadPoolExecutor (max_workers=4)
    └─ run_pi_agent() subprocess (timeout=PI_MAX_TIMEOUT)
         └─ _deliver(): Reply Token → Push Message → Email (three-tier fallback)

Duplicate prevention: one in-flight request per user_id at a time.
"""

import base64
import logging
import os
import re
import threading
import time
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor
from logging.handlers import RotatingFileHandler

from dotenv import load_dotenv
from flask import Flask, abort, request
from linebot.v3 import WebhookHandler
from linebot.v3.exceptions import InvalidSignatureError
from linebot.v3.messaging import (
    ApiClient,
    Configuration,
    MessagingApi,
    MessagingApiBlob,
    PushMessageRequest,
    ReplyMessageRequest,
    TextMessage,
)
from linebot.v3.webhooks import ImageMessageContent, MessageEvent, TextMessageContent

from ai_exam_practice import handle_quiz_answer as handle_ai_exam_answer, send_ai_exam_quiz
from daily_report import send_daily_report_review
from iso27001_quiz import handle_quiz_answer, send_quiz
from finance_news import send_finance_news, set_ask_pi
from network_monitor import run_network_monitor
from pi_rpc import PiRpcClient
from send_email import send_email
from water_reminder import send_water_reminder
from weather import get_weather, parse_weather_command

load_dotenv()

# ── Configuration ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CHANNEL_SECRET: str = os.environ["LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET"]
CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN: str = os.environ["LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN"]
REPLY_TIMEOUT: int = int(os.getenv("REPLY_TIMEOUT", "45"))    # seconds
PI_MAX_TIMEOUT: int = int(os.getenv("PI_MAX_TIMEOUT", "300"))  # seconds
SCHEDULER_SECRET: str = os.getenv("SCHEDULER_SECRET", "")     # pi_scheduler token
# PI_CLI_PATH: base command only, e.g. "node /path/to/cli.js"
# RPC flags (--mode rpc --provider --continue) are added by PiRpcClient
_PI_CLI_RAW: str = os.getenv("PI_CLI_PATH", "pi")
# Strip legacy --print / --no-session / --provider <value> / --model <value> flags if present
def _strip_legacy_flags(tokens: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    result = []
    skip_next = False
    for tok in tokens:
        if skip_next:
            skip_next = False
            continue
        if tok in ("--print", "--no-session"):
            continue
        if tok in ("--provider", "--model"):
            skip_next = True  # skip the value too
            continue
        if tok.startswith("--provider=") or tok.startswith("--model="):
            continue
        result.append(tok)
    return result

_PI_BASE_CMD: list[str] = _strip_legacy_flags(_PI_CLI_RAW.split())
MAX_WORKERS: int = int(os.getenv("MAX_WORKERS", "4"))

# auto-clear in-flight entry after timeout + buffer
_IN_FLIGHT_TTL: int = PI_MAX_TIMEOUT + 60

# ── Logging ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
os.makedirs("logs", exist_ok=True)
_file_handler = RotatingFileHandler(
    "logs/pibot.log", maxBytes=5 * 1024 * 1024, backupCount=5, mode="a"
)
_file_handler.setFormatter(
    logging.Formatter("%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(name)s: %(message)s")
)
logging.basicConfig(
    level=logging.INFO,
    handlers=[_file_handler, logging.StreamHandler()],
)
logger = logging.getLogger("pibot")

# ── Flask & LINE SDK ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
app = Flask(__name__)
handler = WebhookHandler(CHANNEL_SECRET)
_line_config = Configuration(access_token=CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN)

# ── Thread pool ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
_executor = ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=MAX_WORKERS)

# ── In-flight tracking (duplicate prevention) ─────────────────────────────────
_in_flight: dict[str, float] = {}
_in_flight_lock = threading.Lock()

# ── Hourly chime pending state（待補執行任務）────────────────────────────────────
# pi_scheduler 透過 POST /hourly/pending 注入，使用者回覆後觸發補執行
_hourly_pending: dict[str, list[dict]] = {}
_hourly_pending_lock = threading.Lock()


def _set_hourly_pending(user_id: str, tasks: list[dict]) -> None:
    with _hourly_pending_lock:
        _hourly_pending[user_id] = tasks


def _pop_hourly_pending(user_id: str) -> list[dict] | None:
    with _hourly_pending_lock:
        return _hourly_pending.pop(user_id, None)


def _peek_hourly_pending(user_id: str) -> list[dict] | None:
    with _hourly_pending_lock:
        return _hourly_pending.get(user_id)


# ── Pending image store （圖片待命令）───────────────────────────────────────────
# 使用者傳圖後，先暫存圖片資料，待下一句話才連同指令一起送給 pi agent
_pending_images: dict[str, list[dict]] = {}
_pending_images_lock = threading.Lock()


def _set_pending_image(user_id: str, images: list[dict]) -> None:
    with _pending_images_lock:
        _pending_images[user_id] = images
    logger.info("Pending image stored | user=%s", user_id)


def _pop_pending_image(user_id: str) -> list[dict] | None:
    with _pending_images_lock:
        return _pending_images.pop(user_id, None)


def _clear_pending_image(user_id: str) -> None:
    with _pending_images_lock:
        _pending_images.pop(user_id, None)


def _is_duplicate(user_id: str) -> bool:
    """Return True if the user already has a request in flight."""
    now = time.monotonic()
    with _in_flight_lock:
        ts = _in_flight.get(user_id)
        if ts is not None:
            if now - ts < _IN_FLIGHT_TTL:
                return True
            # stale entry — auto-clear
            del _in_flight[user_id]
        _in_flight[user_id] = now
        return False


def _clear_in_flight(user_id: str) -> None:
    with _in_flight_lock:
        _in_flight.pop(user_id, None)


# ── 整點補執行任務執行器 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def _execute_task(task: str, session_label: str = "【補執行 🔄】") -> None:
    """依 task 名稱直接執行對應任務（用於整點補執行）"""
    if task == "water":
        from water_reminder import send_water_reminder
        send_water_reminder()
    elif task == "quiz-noon":
        from iso27001_quiz import send_quiz
        send_quiz(session_label)
    elif task == "quiz-eve":
        from iso27001_quiz import send_quiz
        send_quiz(session_label)
    elif task == "ai-exam-noon":
        from ai_exam_practice import send_ai_exam_quiz
        send_ai_exam_quiz(session_label)
    elif task == "ai-exam-eve":
        from ai_exam_practice import send_ai_exam_quiz
        send_ai_exam_quiz(session_label)
    elif task == "report":
        from daily_report import send_daily_report_review
        send_daily_report_review()
    elif task == "network":
        from network_monitor import run_network_monitor
        run_network_monitor()
    elif task == "news":
        from finance_news import send_finance_news
        send_finance_news()
    else:
        logger.warning("_execute_task: 未知的任務名稱 %s", task)


def _handle_hourly_reply(user_id: str, text: str, reply_token: str) -> bool:
    """
    嘗試處理整點補執行回覆。
    若 user_id 有待補執行任務且訊息格式符合，執行並回傳 True；否則回傳 False。
    """
    pending = _peek_hourly_pending(user_id)
    if pending is None:
        return False

    text_norm = text.strip()

    # 略過
    if text_norm in ("略過", "skip", "跳過", "否", "不用", "no"):
        _pop_hourly_pending(user_id)
        _reply(reply_token, "好的，已略過補執行 👌")
        return True

    # 全部執行
    if text_norm in ("全部", "all", "全", "是", "yes", "全執行"):
        selected_indices = list(range(len(pending)))
    else:
        # 解析「1」「1,2」「1 2」等數字格式
        nums = re.findall(r"\d+", text_norm)
        if not nums:
            return False
        selected_indices = [int(n) - 1 for n in nums if 1 <= int(n) <= len(pending)]
        if not selected_indices:
            return False

    _pop_hourly_pending(user_id)

    triggered: list[str] = []
    for idx in selected_indices:
        task_info = pending[idx]
        task_name = task_info["task"]
        task_label = task_info["label"]
        try:
            _executor.submit(_execute_task, task_name)
            triggered.append(task_label)
            logger.info("補執行已提交：%s (user=%s)", task_name, user_id)
        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
            logger.error("補執行提交失敗 %s：%s", task_name, exc)

    if triggered:
        msg = "✅ 已提交補執行：\n" + "\n".join(f"• {l}" for l in triggered)
    else:
        msg = "⚠️ 沒有找到符合的任務編號"
    _reply(reply_token, msg)
    return True


# ── 模型切換指令 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# provider 別名對應 (別名小寫 → (provider_id, model_id))
# model_id = "" 表示自動選用該 provider 第一個可用模型
_PROVIDER_ALIASES: dict[str, tuple[str, str]] = {
    # Anthropic
    "anthropic":  ("anthropic", "claude-sonnet-4-6"),
    "claude":     ("anthropic", "claude-sonnet-4-6"),
    "sonnet":     ("anthropic", "claude-sonnet-4-6"),
    "opus":       ("anthropic", "claude-opus-4-6"),
    "haiku":      ("anthropic", "claude-haiku-4-5"),
    # Google Gemini (透過 pi login google-gemini-cli)
    "google":     ("google-gemini-cli", "gemini-2.5-pro"),
    "gemini":     ("google-gemini-cli", "gemini-2.5-pro"),
    "gemini pro": ("google-gemini-cli", "gemini-2.5-pro"),
    "gemini flash": ("google-gemini-cli", "gemini-2.0-flash"),
    "flash":      ("google-gemini-cli", "gemini-2.0-flash"),
    # 其他常見 provider
    "openai":     ("openai", "gpt-4o"),
    "gpt":        ("openai", "gpt-4o"),
    "gpt4":       ("openai", "gpt-4o"),
}


def _fmt_model(m: dict) -> str:
    """把 model dict 格式化為一行顯示文字。"""
    ctx = m.get("contextWindow", 0)
    ctx_str = f"{ctx // 1000}K" if ctx else ""
    return f"{m.get('id', '?')}  [{ctx_str}]"


def _handle_model_command(user_id: str, text: str, reply_token: str) -> bool:
    """
    處理模型相關管理指令，回傳 True 表示已處理（不需繼續往下走）。
    這類指令繞過 duplicate 檢查，因為它們是即時管理操作。
    """
    if _pi_client is None:
        _reply(reply_token, "⚠️ pi agent 尚未初始化，請稍後再試")
        return True

    lower = text.strip().lower()

    # ── 模型列表 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if lower in ("模型列表", "可用模型", "model list", "models"):
        try:
            models = _pi_client.get_available_models()
            current = _pi_client.get_current_model() or {}
            current_key = (current.get("provider", ""), current.get("id", ""))
        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
            _reply(reply_token, f"⚠️ 取得模型列表失敗：{exc}")
            return True

        if not models:
            _reply(reply_token, "⚠️ 目前沒有可用模型，請確認 API Key 已設定")
            return True

        # 依 provider 分組
        by_provider: dict[str, list[dict]] = {}
        for m in models:
            by_provider.setdefault(m.get("provider", "?"), []).append(m)

        lines = ["📋 可用 LLM 模型列表", "━" * 20, ""]
        for prov, mlist in sorted(by_provider.items()):
            lines.append(f"🔹 {prov}")
            for m in mlist:
                mid = m.get("id", "?")
                ctx = m.get("contextWindow", 0)
                ctx_str = f"{ctx // 1000}K" if ctx else ""
                mark = " ✅ 使用中" if (prov, mid) == current_key else ""
                lines.append(f"   • {mid}  {ctx_str}{mark}")
            lines.append("")
        lines += [
            "━" * 20,
            "💡 切換指令範例：",
            "  「切換 claude」「切換 gemini」",
            "  「切換 claude-opus-4-6」（指定 model ID）",
        ]
        _reply(reply_token, "\n".join(lines))
        return True

    # ── 目前模型 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if lower in ("目前模型", "當前模型", "current model", "模型狀態"):
        try:
            m = _pi_client.get_current_model() or {}
        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
            _reply(reply_token, f"⚠️ 取得模型狀態失敗：{exc}")
            return True

        prov = m.get("provider", "?")
        mid  = m.get("id", "?")
        ctx  = m.get("contextWindow", 0)
        ctx_str = f"{ctx // 1000}K" if ctx else "?"
        cost_in  = m.get("cost", {}).get("input", 0)
        cost_out = m.get("cost", {}).get("output", 0)
        _reply(
            reply_token,
            f"🤖 目前使用模型\n\n"
            f"Provider：{prov}\n"
            f"Model：{mid}\n"
            f"Context：{ctx_str}\n"
            f"費率：${cost_in:.2f} / ${cost_out:.2f} per M tokens\n\n"
            f"輸入「模型列表」查看所有可用模型",
        )
        return True

    # ── 切換模型 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if lower.startswith(("切換 ", "切換模型 ", "switch ")):
        keyword = (
            lower.removeprefix("切換模型 ")
                 .removeprefix("切換 ")
                 .removeprefix("switch ")
                 .strip()
        )
        if not keyword:
            _reply(reply_token, "⚠️ 請指定模型，例如：「切換 claude」或「切換 gemini」")
            return True

        # 1. 先查別名表
        match_provider, match_id = _PROVIDER_ALIASES.get(keyword, ("", ""))

        # 2. 沒命中別名 → 從可用模型中模糊搜尋
        if not match_provider:
            try:
                all_models = _pi_client.get_available_models()
            except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
                _reply(reply_token, f"⚠️ 取得模型列表失敗：{exc}")
                return True

            # 先找完全符合的 model id
            exact = [m for m in all_models if m.get("id", "").lower() == keyword]
            # 再找包含關鍵字的
            partial = [m for m in all_models
                       if keyword in m.get("id", "").lower()
                       or keyword in m.get("provider", "").lower()]

            candidates = exact or partial
            if not candidates:
                _reply(
                    reply_token,
                    f"⚠️ 找不到符合「{keyword}」的模型\n\n"
                    "輸入「模型列表」查看所有可用模型",
                )
                return True

            if len(candidates) > 1:
                # 多個候選 → 列出讓使用者再指定
                lines = [f"🔍 找到 {len(candidates)} 個符合「{keyword}」的模型：", ""]
                for m in candidates[:8]:
                    lines.append(f"  • {m.get('provider')}/{m.get('id')}")
                lines += ["", "請使用完整 model ID 再次切換，例如："]
                lines.append(f"  切換 {candidates[0].get('id')}")
                _reply(reply_token, "\n".join(lines))
                return True

            match_provider = candidates[0].get("provider", "")
            match_id       = candidates[0].get("id", "")

        # 3. 嘗試切換
        try:
            result = _pi_client.set_model(match_provider, match_id)
        except RuntimeError as exc:
            err = str(exc)
            hint = ""
            if "not found" in err.lower():
                hint = "\n\n可能原因：該 provider 的 API Key 未設定，或模型 ID 不正確\n輸入「模型列表」確認可用模型"
            _reply(reply_token, f"⚠️ 切換失敗：{err}{hint}")
            return True
        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
            _reply(reply_token, f"⚠️ 切換失敗：{exc}")
            return True

        prov = result.get("provider", match_provider)
        mid  = result.get("id", match_id)
        ctx  = result.get("contextWindow", 0)
        ctx_str = f"{ctx // 1000}K" if ctx else "?"
        _reply(
            reply_token,
            f"✅ 已切換 LLM 模型\n\n"
            f"Provider：{prov}\n"
            f"Model：{mid}\n"
            f"Context：{ctx_str}\n\n"
            f"接下來的對話將使用新模型。",
        )
        logger.info("Model switched → %s/%s (user=%s)", prov, mid, user_id)
        return True

    return False


# ── LINE messaging helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def _reply(reply_token: str, text: str) -> bool:
    try:
        with ApiClient(_line_config) as api_client:
            MessagingApi(api_client).reply_message(
                ReplyMessageRequest(
                    reply_token=reply_token,
                    messages=[TextMessage(text=text)],
                )
            )
        logger.info("Reply sent (token=%s…)", reply_token[:8])
        return True
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
        logger.error("Reply failed: %s", exc)
        return False


def _push(user_id: str, text: str) -> bool:
    try:
        with ApiClient(_line_config) as api_client:
            MessagingApi(api_client).push_message(
                PushMessageRequest(
                    to=user_id,
                    messages=[TextMessage(text=text)],
                )
            )
        logger.info("Push sent to %s", user_id)
        return True
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
        logger.error("Push failed: %s", exc)
        return False


def _deliver(reply_token: str, user_id: str, text: str, elapsed: float) -> None:
    """Three-tier delivery: Reply Token → Push Message → Email."""
    if elapsed < REPLY_TIMEOUT:
        if _reply(reply_token, text):
            return
    # Reply token expired or failed → Push
    logger.info("Falling back to Push for user %s (elapsed=%.1fs)", user_id, elapsed)
    if _push(user_id, text):
        return
    # Push failed → Email
    logger.warning("Push failed, falling back to Email for user %s", user_id)
    send_email(
        subject=f"[PiBot] 訊息傳送失敗 - 用戶 {user_id}",
        body=(
            f"Reply Token 和 Push Message 均失敗。\n\n"
            f"用戶：{user_id}\n"
            f"耗時：{elapsed:.1f}s\n\n"
            f"回應內容：\n{text}"
        ),
    )


# ── pi RPC client ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
_pi_client: PiRpcClient | None = None

def _init_pi_client() -> None:
    global _pi_client
    _pi_client = PiRpcClient(
        base_cmd=_PI_BASE_CMD,
        env=os.environ.copy(),
        timeout=PI_MAX_TIMEOUT,
    )
    logger.info("pi RPC client initialised (cmd=%s)", " ".join(_PI_BASE_CMD))
    set_ask_pi(_ask_pi)


def _ask_pi(message: str, images: list[dict] | None = None) -> str:
    """Send a prompt to the persistent pi RPC session and return the response."""
    if _pi_client is None:
        logger.warning("pi RPC client 為 None，嘗試重新初始化…")
        try:
            _init_pi_client()
        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
            logger.error("pi RPC client 重新初始化失敗：%s", exc)
            return f"[錯誤] pi RPC client 重新初始化失敗：{exc}"
        if _pi_client is None:
            return "[錯誤] pi RPC client 初始化失敗，請聯繫管理員"
    try:
        return _pi_client.prompt(message, images=images)
    except TimeoutError:
        logger.error("pi agent timed out after %ds", PI_MAX_TIMEOUT)
        return f"[逾時] pi agent 超過 {PI_MAX_TIMEOUT} 秒未回應"
    except RuntimeError as exc:
        logger.error("pi RPC runtime error: %s", exc)
        return f"[錯誤] {exc}"
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
        logger.error("pi agent unexpected error: %s", exc)
        return f"[錯誤] {exc}"


# ── Background task ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def _process_message(
    user_id: str,
    reply_token: str,
    user_message: str,
    images: list[dict] | None = None,
) -> None:
    start = time.monotonic()
    logger.info("Processing | user=%s | message=%s", user_id, user_message[:80])
    try:
        response = _ask_pi(user_message, images=images)
        elapsed = time.monotonic() - start
        logger.info("pi agent done | user=%s | elapsed=%.1fs", user_id, elapsed)

        _deliver(reply_token, user_id, response, elapsed)

        # Send slow-response email notification
        if elapsed > REPLY_TIMEOUT:
            send_email(
                subject=f"[小黃報報] 慢速回應通知 - 用戶 {user_id}",
                body=(
                    f"回應耗時 {elapsed:.1f}s，超過閾值 {REPLY_TIMEOUT}s。\n\n"
                    f"用戶：{user_id}\n"
                    f"問題：{user_message}\n\n"
                    f"回應：\n{response}"
                ),
            )
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
        logger.exception("Unexpected error processing message: %s", exc)
        elapsed = time.monotonic() - start
        _deliver(reply_token, user_id, f"[系統錯誤] {exc}", elapsed)
    finally:
        _clear_in_flight(user_id)

@app.route("/webhook", methods=["POST"])
def webhook() -> str:
    signature = request.headers.get("X-Line-Signature", "")
    body = request.get_data(as_text=True)
    logger.debug("Webhook received | body=%s", body[:200])
    try:
        handler.handle(body, signature)
    except InvalidSignatureError:
        logger.warning("Invalid LINE signature — request rejected")
        abort(400)
    return "OK"


@handler.add(MessageEvent, message=TextMessageContent)
def on_text_message(event: MessageEvent) -> None:
    user_id: str = event.source.user_id
    reply_token: str = event.reply_token
    user_message: str = event.message.text
    msg_strip = user_message.strip()

    # 模型管理指令（繞過 duplicate 檢查，即時回應）
    # 觸發關鍵字：「切換」「模型列表」「目前模型」
    lower_msg = msg_strip.lower()
    if (
        lower_msg.startswith(("切換 ", "切換模型 ", "switch "))
        or lower_msg in ("模型列表", "可用模型", "model list", "models",
                         "目前模型", "當前模型", "current model", "模型狀態")
    ):
        _handle_model_command(user_id, msg_strip, reply_token)
        return

    if _is_duplicate(user_id):
        logger.info("Duplicate request from %s — ignored", user_id)
        _reply(reply_token, "您的上一個問題仍在處理中，請稍候...")
        return

    # 如果有待命令的圖片，以使用者這句話為指令送出
    pending_imgs = _pop_pending_image(user_id)
    if pending_imgs is not None:
        logger.info(
            "Image+instruction | user=%s | instruction=%s",
            user_id, user_message[:80],
        )
        _executor.submit(_process_message, user_id, reply_token, user_message, pending_imgs)
        return

    # 處理特定指令

    # 整點補執行回覆攔截（優先於其他處理）
    if _handle_hourly_reply(user_id, msg_strip, reply_token):
        _clear_in_flight(user_id)
        return

    # ISO 27001 答題攔截
    quiz_result = handle_quiz_answer(user_id, msg_strip)
    if quiz_result is not None:
        _reply(reply_token, quiz_result)
        _clear_in_flight(user_id)
        return

    # AI 應用規劃師 答題攔截
    ai_exam_result = handle_ai_exam_answer(user_id, msg_strip)
    if ai_exam_result is not None:
        _reply(reply_token, ai_exam_result)
        _clear_in_flight(user_id)
        return

    # 天氣查詢
    weather_city = parse_weather_command(msg_strip)
    if weather_city is not None:
        weather_result = get_weather(weather_city)
        _reply(reply_token, weather_result)
        _clear_in_flight(user_id)
        return

    _executor.submit(_process_message, user_id, reply_token, user_message)


@handler.add(MessageEvent, message=ImageMessageContent)
def on_image_message(event: MessageEvent) -> None:
    user_id: str = event.source.user_id
    reply_token: str = event.reply_token
    message_id: str = event.message.id

    if _is_duplicate(user_id):
        logger.info("Duplicate image request from %s — ignored", user_id)
        _reply(reply_token, "您的上一個問題仍在處理中，請稍候...")
        return

    # Download image from LINE and encode as base64
    try:
        with ApiClient(_line_config) as api_client:
            content: bytes = MessagingApiBlob(api_client).get_message_content(message_id)
        b64 = base64.b64encode(content).decode()
        images = [{"type": "image", "data": b64, "mimeType": "image/jpeg"}]
        logger.info("Image downloaded | user=%s | size=%d bytes", user_id, len(content))
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
        logger.error("Failed to download image: %s", exc)
        _reply(reply_token, f"[錯誤] 無法下載圖片：{exc}")
        _clear_in_flight(user_id)
        return

    # 暫存圖片，詢問使用者要怎麼處理（不直接呼叫 pi，避免 "already processing" 錯誤）
    _set_pending_image(user_id, images)
    _reply(
        reply_token,
        "📷 圖片已收到！請告訴我想要做什麼？例如：\n\n"
        "『描述圖片內容』\n"
        "『識別圖片中的文字（OCR）』\n"
        "『分析這張圖片（自行描述想要做的事）』",
    )
    _clear_in_flight(user_id)

import os
